text.style: font: italic 9.2px 'DejaVu Sans', 'Arial', 'Calibri', 'Helvetica', sans-serif; text-anchor: start

g.text: Notes. Solid arrows denote hypothesized positive relationships. Brand satisfaction is modelled as a mediator (H3) of the engagement/experience–success links via the indirect paths a₁b and a₂b; c₁′ and c₂′ denote direct effects. P1
(equifinality): multiple sufficient configurations of UE, UX and BSAT can yield high BSUC, evaluated through fuzzy-set qualitative comparative analysis (fsQCA).
